header.name: Kikang Kim
header.tagline: I design stable and scalable service architectures.

about.title: About
about.description: Backend engineer with 5+ years of experience, specializing in Python. Experienced in large-scale traffic handling on AWS, real-time data pipeline design, and search engine optimization. Achieved 94.8x throughput improvement through Pub/Sub architecture and contributed to growing a service from 300K to 10M+ monthly page views.

description: Migrated REST API to GraphQL, enabling precise data fetching, eliminating over-fetching, and improving client development productivity
Redesigned scheduler-based batch processing to RabbitMQ Pub/Sub architecture, achieving 94.8x average throughput improvement with per-patient event processing and real-time alerts
Implemented message failover strategies including Retry, DLQ, and Sequence management for reliable message processing
Built Datadog-based APM dashboards, error rate tracking, service health monitoring, and on-call alerting
Developed AI agent-powered on-call bot — automated codebase analysis for incident diagnosis via Slack, improving team on-call efficiency by 20%

projects.name: AITRICS-VC
projects.description: Real-time vital sign monitoring and AI prediction system

description: Owned end-to-end backend design and operations for multiple B2B/B2C services including VODA, VORY-Q, AI Canvas, and AIVORY
Built behavioral data collection pipeline using AWS API Gateway + SQS, supporting growth from 300K to 10M+ monthly PV
Managed GPU resources on Kubernetes and designed a Redis-backed workload-aware job scheduler
Optimized Elasticsearch incremental indexing, reducing data visualization processing time by up to 95%

items.name: recsys-pipeline
items.description: Production-grade recommendation pipeline for 50M DAU commerce — 4-Plane architecture with 3-Tier serving, runs locally with docker-compose, scales to 500K RPS on Kubernetes
highlights: 3-stage serving: Two-Tower candidate generation → session-aware re-ranking → DCN-V2 GPU scoring
4-Plane architecture (Data/Stream/Batch/Control) with Envoy, Flink, PySpark, and Airflow
Cloud-agnostic: single docker-compose up for local development, Kubernetes manifests for production

items.name: binance-futures-bot
items.description: Automated Binance futures trading bot — technical indicator algorithms with multi-agent trading firm patterns, no AI/LLM required
highlights: 8-indicator weighted voting (RSI, MACD, BB, EMA, ATR, ADX, Stochastic) with per-profile signal quality filters
10-gate risk management: margin exposure limits, daily loss caps, drawdown blocking
Adversarial signal validation, BM25 situation memory, and post-trade reflection system
4 trading profiles (Conservative/Neutral/Aggressive/Scalp) with dynamic leverage adjustment

items.name: auto-card-news
items.description: Automated RSS-to-Threads card news pipeline — fetches news, generates 6-card carousel PNGs, and publishes via Graph API
highlights: End-to-end pipeline: RSS fetch → Playwright scraping → AI summarization → HTML/CSS card rendering → Threads publish
Immutable frozen dataclass models, URL dedup + publish history for duplicate prevention
Cloudinary image hosting with automatic cleanup, APScheduler-based periodic execution
